summary: Ticket E: References Alignment testing complete. All features verified working. Fixed a bug in ReferenceIntegrityService.build_response_data where response_data could be None causing AttributeError.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Line 24125: Fixed response_data None handling in build_response_data
seed_data_creation: Restored reference_2_response_data for test employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket E References Alignment is complete. The normalized references endpoint returns 5 sections: declared_referee, request, response, integrity, verification. ReferenceResponseDrawer displays all sections correctly with action buttons.

reference_row_component.details: ReferenceRow displays in Compliance File with correct lifecycle status badges

drawer_declared_referee_section.details: Shows name, organisation, email, phone, employment period

drawer_submitted_response_section.details: Shows responder details, employment details, performance assessment, safeguarding

drawer_integrity_check_section.details: Shows email_match, name_match, organisation_match with Match/Mismatch badges

drawer_review_outcome_section.details: Shows verification status with Verify, Reject, Request Replacement buttons

reference_actions.details: Send Request, Resend, View Response, View History buttons work correctly

lifecycle_status_badges.details: Verified, Mismatch, awaiting verification badges display correctly

bug_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' in ReferenceIntegrityService.build_response_data
bug_fixed.root_cause: response_data was explicitly set to None in database, but code used .get() with default {} which doesn't handle explicit None
